Project summary report

Source: R/analytics.R
qc_summary_report.Rd

Compiles key project statistics into a named list of tibbles suitable for rendering with knitr::kable() or flextable. The return value has S3 class "qc_report" with a print method that produces a formatted console summary.

Usage

qc_summary_report(project, include_metrics = TRUE, top_n = 15L)

Arguments

project

A qc_project object.

include_metrics

Logical. When TRUE (default), calls qc_code_metrics() and includes prevalence, density, and dispersion.

top_n

Integer. Number of top codes / co-occurrences to include.

Value

An S3 object of class "qc_report": a named list with elements project, corpus, codes, cooccurrence, coders, and metrics.

On this page
